name: A Party To Die For!
description:
"Come on now, don’t be a party pooper! Just stay still, it’ll be super fun, I pinkie promise!"

If you want to see initial chat, please check public chat! (And also please check the Cupcake story first before even trying this bot!)

Warning: Gore, violence, etc, and finally IT IS A DEAD DOVE SO IF YOU DONT LIKE THIS BOT OR STORY, THEN SIMPLY PLEASE DONT USE IT.

"Ooooh! Just a teensy-weensy, itty-bitty, little-bitty rework of the first message, everything else is the same! Buuut the big, big difference? Longer and more super-duper equine anatomy accuracy~!"

{ Artist: piesinful | "Cupcakes" story by: Sargent Sprinkles }

Sweet Celestia, I ain't going through that side of my brain AGAIN. Sorry that side of me only exclusive to mlp Halloween! Or never to be use again. Also here you go, The Pink One! Tags: Mlp, My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic, Equestria, Pinkie Pie, Cupcake, Mare
creator: Whenisit
